'''bodhadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillose|fibrillose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillose|fibrillose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bodhadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bodhadithi|bodhadithi]] || [[word:bodhadiji|bodhadiji]] || [[word:bodhadishi|bodhadishi]] || [[word:bodhadiki|bodhadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bodhaduthuthu|bodhaduthuthu]] || [[word:bodhadujuju|bodhadujuju]] || [[word:bodhadushushu|bodhadushushu]] || [[word:bodhadukuku|bodhadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bodhaduthu|bodhaduthu]] || [[word:bodhaduju|bodhaduju]] || [[word:bodhadushu|bodhadushu]] || [[word:bodhaduku|bodhaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bodhadufthuf|bodhadufthuf]] || [[word:bodhadufjuf|bodhadufjuf]] || [[word:bodhadufshuf|bodhadufshuf]] || [[word:bodhadufkuf|bodhadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bodhadethe|bodhadethe]] || [[word:bodhadeje|bodhadeje]] || [[word:bodhadeshe|bodhadeshe]] || [[word:bodhadeke|bodhadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bodhadothotho|bodhadothotho]] || [[word:bodhadojojo|bodhadojojo]] || [[word:bodhadoshosho|bodhadoshosho]] || [[word:bodhadokoko|bodhadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bodhadotho|bodhadotho]] || [[word:bodhadojo|bodhadojo]] || [[word:bodhadosho|bodhadosho]] || [[word:bodhadoko|bodhadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bodhadofthof|bodhadofthof]] || [[word:bodhadofjof|bodhadofjof]] || [[word:bodhadofshof|bodhadofshof]] || [[word:bodhadofkof|bodhadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bodhadïfthïf|bodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfjïf|bodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfshïf|bodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfkïf|bodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bodhadïfthïfthïf|bodhadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfjïfjïf|bodhadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfshïfshïf|bodhadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfkïfkïf|bodhadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bodhadïfthïf|bodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfjïf|bodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfshïf|bodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfkïf|bodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bodhadïfthïf|bodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfjïf|bodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfshïf|bodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:bodhadïfkïf|bodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bodhadæthæ|bodhadæthæ]] || [[word:bodhadæjæ|bodhadæjæ]] || [[word:bodhadæshæ|bodhadæshæ]] || [[word:bodhadækæ|bodhadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bodhadathatha|bodhadathatha]] || [[word:bodhadajaja|bodhadajaja]] || [[word:bodhadashasha|bodhadashasha]] || [[word:bodhadakaka|bodhadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bodhadatha|bodhadatha]] || [[word:bodhadaja|bodhadaja]] || [[word:bodhadasha|bodhadasha]] || [[word:bodhadaka|bodhadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bodhadafthaf|bodhadafthaf]] || [[word:bodhadafjaf|bodhadafjaf]] || [[word:bodhadafshaf|bodhadafshaf]] || [[word:bodhadafkaf|bodhadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bodhadasha|bodhadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bodhadshësha|bodhadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bodhadrosha|bodhadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bodhadmusha|bodhadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bodhadyasha|bodhadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobodhadnkshësha|gobodhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobodhadnkrosha|gobodhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobodhadnkmusha|gobodhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobodhadnkyasha|gobodhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bodhadhadasha|bodhadhadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bodhadhadshësha|bodhadhadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bodhadhadrosha|bodhadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bodhadhadmusha|bodhadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bodhadhadyasha|bodhadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobodhadhadnkshësha|gobodhadhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobodhadhadnkrosha|gobodhadhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobodhadhadnkmusha|gobodhadhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobodhadhadnkyasha|gobodhadhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bedhædasha|bedhædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bedhædshësha|bedhædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bedhædrosha|bedhædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bedhædmusha|bedhædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bedhædyasha|bedhædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobedhædnkshësha|gobedhædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobedhædnkrosha|gobedhædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobedhædnkmusha|gobedhædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobedhædnkyasha|gobedhædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bodhfadasha|bodhfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bodhfadshësha|bodhfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bodhfadrosha|bodhfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bodhfadmusha|bodhfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bodhfadyasha|bodhfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobodhfadnkshësha|gobodhfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobodhfadnkrosha|gobodhfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobodhfadnkmusha|gobodhfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobodhfadnkyasha|gobodhfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
